About Us

Protective Security Solution PSS LTD is a trusted UK-based independent security company established in 2011, with over 20 years of combined industry experience.

Our Mission

At PSS LTD, we are committed to providing exceptional security services with integrity, professionalism, and attention to detail. We understand that security needs differ across industries, which is why we tailor our solutions to address the specific requirements of each client.

We have grown steadily since our establishment, continuously expanding our service offerings while maintaining our dedication to excellence that has defined us from day one.

Our team consists of highly trained security professionals who are vetted, qualified, and continuously upskilled to ensure they meet the highest standards in the industry.

Trusted & Reliable
Known for our consistency and dependability across all security services.
20+ Years Experience
Combined industry expertise providing security solutions to diverse clients.
Professional Team
Fully trained, qualified security professionals with ongoing development.
94% Training Success Rate
Excellence in security training with consistent high success rates.

Our Services

We deliver a comprehensive range of security services across London and the South East, tailored to meet your specific needs.

Static Security

Professional guarding services for properties, facilities, and assets with detailed reporting.

Event Security

Comprehensive security for events of all sizes, ensuring smooth operations and attendee safety.

CCTV Monitoring

24/7 surveillance and monitoring services using advanced security technology.

Private Investigation

Discreet, thorough investigation services conducted by experienced professionals.

View All Services

Client Testimonials

Don't just take our word for it. Here's what our clients have to say about our security services.

James Wilson
Event Director, London Events Ltd

"PSS LTD provided exceptional security for our annual festival. Their team was professional, attentive, and handled all situations with the utmost care. We'll definitely be using their services for future events."

Sarah Thompson
Property Manager, Highgate Residentials

"We've been using PSS LTD for static security across our residential buildings for the past 3 years. Their reliability and attention to detail has significantly improved our residents' sense of safety."

Michael Roberts
Operations Manager, Thames Retail Group

"After implementing PSS LTD's security recommendations and hiring their team, we've seen a dramatic decrease in security incidents at our retail locations. Their expertise is unmatched."

Emily Chen
HR Director, Tech Innovations UK

"The close protection services provided by PSS LTD for our executive team during international travel have been exemplary. Professional, discreet, and highly effective."

Our Services

We deliver a comprehensive range of security services tailored to meet the specific needs of our diverse clientele across London and the South East.

Event Security

Comprehensive security for events of all sizes, ensuring smooth operations and attendee safety.

Static Security

Reliable guarding services for properties, facilities, and assets with detailed reporting.

Door Supervision

Professional entrance management ensuring venue safety while maintaining a welcoming atmosphere.

Private Investigation

Discreet, thorough investigation services conducted by experienced professionals.

Close Protection

Personalized security for individuals requiring heightened protection and privacy.

Subcontracting

Flexible security personnel provision to support your existing security operations.

CCTV Monitoring

24/7 surveillance and monitoring services using advanced security technology.

Cleaning Services

Professional commercial and residential cleaning services maintaining pristine environments.

Security Officer

Professional security officers providing vigilant protection and proactive risk management for your premises.

Join Our Team

We're always looking for talented individuals to join our growing team across London and the South East.

Current Opportunities

We currently have positions available for Door Supervisors, Static Guards, and Event Security Staff throughout London and the South East. All applicants must be SIA licensed or willing to undertake training.

Terms & Conditions

Welcome to Protective Security Solution PSS LTD. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.

1. Services

PSS LTD provides professional security services across London and the South East, including event security, static guarding, door supervision, close protection, CCTV monitoring and private investigation.

2. Engagement

All services are subject to a written agreement between PSS LTD and the client. Quotations are valid for 30 days unless otherwise stated.

3. Liability

PSS LTD maintains full public liability insurance. Our liability is limited to the terms set out in the individual service agreement.

4. Updates

These terms may be updated from time to time. Please check back periodically for changes.

Privacy Policy

Protective Security Solution PSS LTD respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data.

What we collect

We collect information you provide directly via our enquiry forms, such as your name, email address, phone number and message.

How we use it

We use your information solely to respond to your enquiry, provide quotations, and deliver the services you request.

Sharing

We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

Your rights

Under UK GDPR you have the right to access, correct or request deletion of your data. Contact us at info@protectivesecuritysolution.com.

Cookie Policy

Our website uses a small number of cookies to ensure the site functions correctly and to understand how visitors use it.

Essential cookies

These are required for the site to operate and cannot be disabled.

Analytics cookies

We may use anonymous analytics to improve the website. No personally identifiable information is collected.

Managing cookies

You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect site functionality.
